name: malt-mcp
description: Connect Claude to your Malt.fr freelance account -profile, stats, and missions
long_description:
# Malt MCP Server

Connect Claude to your Malt.fr freelance account. View your profile, track stats, browse missions, and get mission details -all through Claude Desktop.

## First-time setup

1. Install the `.mcpb` bundle in Claude Desktop.
2. On the first tool call, a browser window opens so you can log into Malt.
3. Your session is saved locally in `~/.malt-mcp/profile/` and persists across restarts.

**Note:** Only email/password login is supported. Google OAuth is blocked by Google when automated.

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Get freelance profile info (bio, daily rate, skills, rating). Omit username to fetch your own profile.

tools.name: get_statistics
tools.description: View profile stats (views, response rate, missions)

tools.name: get_missions
tools.description: List mission conversations from messaging inbox

tools.name: get_mission_details
tools.description: Get full details of a specific mission (budget, skills, messages)
